landingTestimonials.quote: ForesightCS gave our CSM team a single source of truth. We stopped chasing spreadsheets and started protecting revenue.
landingTestimonials.name: Amina Shah
landingTestimonials.title: VP Customer Success

landingTestimonials.quote: The health model is opinionated enough to be useful, but flexible enough to fit our billing and product data perfectly.
landingTestimonials.name: Jordan Lee
landingTestimonials.title: RevOps Lead

landingTestimonials.quote: Every CSM knows what to do next. Leadership gets a clean revenue story. It changed how we operate entirely.
landingTestimonials.name: Marta Alvarez
landingTestimonials.title: Founder

landingTestimonials.quote: We identified three at-risk accounts in our first week. Two of those became expansions because we acted early.
landingTestimonials.name: Daniel Chen
landingTestimonials.title: Director of CS

landingTestimonials.quote: The rule builder let us encode years of institutional knowledge into automated workflows. That's invaluable.
landingTestimonials.name: Priya Nair
landingTestimonials.title: Head of Renewals

landingTestimonials.quote: Setup was seamless. We had our first risk signals in under 24 hours. Incredible time-to-value.
landingTestimonials.name: Marcus Williams
landingTestimonials.title: COO

howItWorks.title: Connect your signals
howItWorks.description: Integrate product telemetry, billing events, support data, and CRM context into one unified health layer in minutes.

howItWorks.title: Predict risk early
howItWorks.description: Our ML model scores every account daily based on your weighted signals, surfacing churn risk weeks before it becomes visible.

howItWorks.title: Act with playbooks
howItWorks.description: Turn risk signals into prescriptive actions — executive outreach, QBR scheduling, billing follow-ups — and track outcomes.

playbooks.name: Critical Churn Intervention
playbooks.description: Executive-level outreach for accounts flagged Critical by the ML model.

playbooks.name: Engagement Drop Recovery
playbooks.description: Automated outreach when login frequency falls more than 30% week-over-week.

playbooks.name: 90-Day Renewal Prep
playbooks.description: Structured renewal preparation playbook triggered 90 days before contract end.

playbooks.name: Expansion Opportunity
playbooks.description: Triggered when usage crosses 90% capacity — signals upsell readiness.

playbooks.name: Low NPS Recovery
playbooks.description: Immediate CSM intervention when NPS falls below 20.

acme-cloud.title: Feature adoption spike
acme-cloud.detail: Invites, dashboards, and automation workflows all crossed 80% weekly usage.

acme-cloud.title: Billing renewal confirmed
acme-cloud.detail: Customer pre-approved annual renewal with no commercial risk flagged.

acme-cloud.title: Support resolved
acme-cloud.detail: One P1 ticket closed after API rate limit tuning and cache optimization.

northstar-health.title: Logins declined
northstar-health.detail: Weekly active seats dropped 28% after a workflow rollout went unacknowledged.

northstar-health.title: QBR rescheduled twice
northstar-health.detail: The customer success QBR was rescheduled twice by the customer team — risk signal.

northstar-health.title: Invoice reminder sent
northstar-health.detail: Automated billing nudge sent. Customer acknowledged but cited budget review delay.

atlas-retail.title: API usage collapsed
atlas-retail.detail: API calls dropped 70% in a single week following internal tech change.

atlas-retail.title: Executive sponsor left
atlas-retail.detail: Primary champion (VP Product) gave notice — key relationship at risk.

atlas-retail.title: P1 support escalation
atlas-retail.detail: Three P1 tickets opened in 48 hours. Engineering patched root cause.

atlas-retail.title: Renewal risk flagged
atlas-retail.detail: Automated model elevated to Critical. Executive outreach initiated.

bluepine-studio.title: Onboarding completed
bluepine-studio.detail: All 12 team members completed onboarding. Activation milestone hit.

bluepine-studio.title: NPS response: 72
bluepine-studio.detail: Customer submitted a glowing NPS with expansion interest noted.

orbit-finance.title: Login frequency dropped
orbit-finance.detail: Daily logins fell from 8/day to 3/day — engagement health degrading.

orbit-finance.title: Support ticket opened
orbit-finance.detail: P2 ticket: billing export workflow broken after last update.

orbit-finance.title: Ticket resolved
orbit-finance.detail: Engineering patched the export bug. Customer confirmed fix.

summit-ops.title: Expansion signal detected
summit-ops.detail: Usage crossed 95% capacity on their current tier — strong upsell indicator.

summit-ops.title: New team joined
summit-ops.detail: Finance team onboarded to ForesightCS — 5 new seats added.

summit-ops.title: Pre-renewal discussion
summit-ops.detail: CSM and VP CS aligned on 2-year renewal with 15% ARR expansion.
